verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Official page is by Shadowrise Devs and currently titled [2x Luck] Sailor Piece. The description tells players to join the community server for news, updates, and exclusive reward codes, and lists max level 20000. It does not expose current code strings.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Public web access did not expose Discord channel messages or the code-list/game-announcements posts. Discord was not used as direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board
sources.notes: Public web access returned Trello's JavaScript/resource loading failure. Previous checks found the public codes card lagging behind current code waves, so Trello was not used as direct proof today.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Search/opened page showed an updated May 25, 2026 note and 10 active codes: 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, FREECODEFORYALLL2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and older predecessor codes as inactive. It says new codes are posted in the official Discord game-announcements channel.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 27, 2026 after looking for new codes. Lists 10 active codes: the two May 25 additions plus SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS. It lists level 12,500 for the two May 25 additions and the restart/content codes, and level 7,500 for GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG as expired.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Published/updated May 27, 2026 and lists 11 active codes: the two May 25 additions, all three restart-bug variants, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS. It lists older predecessor codes such as 700KFAVSTY, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1/2, 1B100MVISITS, 1B200MVISITS, and 1B300MVISITS as expired.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 25, 2026 and says it added new Sailor Piece codes on May 25. Lists the two May 25 codes plus all 9 previously retained Ghoul Update active codes and provides exact reward bundles for most retained codes. It still lists older predecessor codes as active, creating a stale-listing conflict. It says codes arrive in the official Discord code-list channel.

sources.name: Dexerto Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 26, 2026 to add two new codes. Lists 21 active codes, including the 11 codes retained here, and provides exact reward bundles for the two newest codes and most retained codes. It still lists older predecessor codes as active, so it was treated as good exact-reward support but not as strong expiry evidence. It points readers to the official Discord server for new codes.

sources.name: SuperCheats Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Last updated/checked May 25, 2026. Lists the same 11 active codes retained here and provides exact reward bundles for the two May 25 codes and several retained codes. It lists the older predecessor codes as expired and notes user-submitted code pages may not be independently tested.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 23, 2026. Lists the prior Ghoul wave including SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG, but omits RAIDS and the two May 25 codes. It lists several older predecessor codes as expired. Treated as useful reward support for older retained codes but stale for the May 25 additions.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Search result still showed updated May 24, 2026. Previous checks found it lists the prior Ghoul Update set but omits SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and the two May 25 codes, while still listing several older predecessor codes as active. Treated as lagging/stale for today.

sources.name: Game.guide Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Prior May 26 check found the page reported 7 active codes and last updated May 22, 2026, omitting the May 25 additions and RAIDS. Treated as conflicting/stale and not used to remove active codes.

decisions.reason: Kept active because GamesRadar updated May 27 and lists it active/new, while Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, Dexerto, and SuperCheats also list it active/current. Changed min_level from null to 12500 because GamesRadar now publishes that numeric requirement. Exact reward bundle remains supported by Beebom, Dexerto, and SuperCheats.

Kept active because GamesRadar updated May 27 and lists it active/new, while Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, Dexerto, and SuperCheats also list it active/current. Changed min_level from null to 12500 because GamesRadar now publishes that numeric requirement. Exact reward bundle remains supported by Beebom, Dexerto, and SuperCheats.
Listed active/current by Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, and GamesRadar. Level gate remains 12500 based on GamesRadar.
Listed active/current by Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, and GamesRadar. Level gate remains 12500 based on GamesRadar.

Destructoid, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, and PCGamesN list it active/current, while Pro Game Guides lists it inactive and GamesRadar lists it expired. Kept active because expiry evidence remains split and no official expiry proof was accessible.
Listed active/current by Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, PCGamesN, and GamesRadar; reward bundle and level 12500 gate remain supported by current/recent sources.
Listed active/current by Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, PCGamesN, and GamesRadar; reward bundle and level 12500 gate remain supported by current/recent sources.
Listed active/current by Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, PCGamesN, and GamesRadar; reward bundle and level 12500 gate remain supported by current/recent sources.
Listed active/current by Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, and GamesRadar. Beebom/Dexerto support the stored exact reward bundle and GamesRadar supports level 7500.

Listed active/current by Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, and GamesRadar. Beebom and PCGamesN support the stored reward bundle; Dexerto still lists a conflicting raid-key bundle. GamesRadar supports level 7500.

Listed active/current by Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, and GamesRadar. PCGamesN and Game.guide omit it but do not give direct expiry evidence. Reward bundle and level 7500 gate remain supported by current/recent sources.

No active code had strong enough new expiry evidence to move today. SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG remains split rather than conclusively expired. Older predecessor codes stayed expired because PGG, Destructoid, SuperCheats, PCGamesN, and GamesRadar support expiry/omission more strongly than stale active listings.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides lists it inactive and GamesRadar lists it expired. Destructoid updated May 27 and lists it active; Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, and recent PCGamesN support it active.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or another strong current source joins the explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: 700KFAVSTY, FREECODEHERE1, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1, DELAYCODENR2, 1B100MVISITS, 1B200MVISITS, 1B300MVISITS, 1M100KLIKESTYYY, and TYSMFOR400KFOLLOWONEVENT remain split. Pro Game Guides, Destructoid, SuperCheats, PCGamesN, and GamesRadar treat many as inactive/expired or omit them; Beebom, Dexerto, and Pocket Gamer still list some/all as active.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not restore unless official evidence appears or active-source agreement becomes stronger than the stale-listing pattern.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom and PCGamesN support the stored no-raid-key bundle, while Dexerto lists a raid-key bundle with fewer bloodline stones. Current Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and SuperCheats only say free rewards.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep the stored exact bundle until official evidence or stronger exact-source agreement confirms a different reward.

source_conflicts.conflict: Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Dexerto, SuperCheats, and GamesRadar list RAIDS active/current. PCGamesN and Game.guide omit it, but neither states it is expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active unless an explicit current expiry source or official proof appears.
